info._value: The Secret Base of the Purrfect
Tracking Down of the People on Mars
The Encounter between Aliens and Humankind
The Secret Base of the Ancient Times

string._value: A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away...\r\nThere was a space war between planet Purr and Mars.
Planet Purr was destroyed...\r\nThe surviving Purrers fled.
The Purrers arrived somewhere...\r\nIt was an unknown blue planet.
The science and technology of the blue planet\r\nwas still undeveloped,\r\nbut the natives welcomed the Purrers.
The Purrers decided to help these kind\r\nand sociable natives.
A brilliant ancient civilization was born on the blue planet\r\nthanks to the science and technology of the Purrers.
Secret Base of the Purrers:\r\nAn important place for the Purrfect Rangers\r\nto gather and meet.
Wide Area Monitoring Antenna:\r\nMonitors UFOs of the Martians.
Cat Symbol:\r\nAll Purrers' buildings are marked with a cat symbol.
Martian Prohibitory Sign:\r\nPurrers are hostile towards the Martians.
The Secret Base of the Purrers is usually disguised\r\nas a beauty salon.
The Martians who won the war tracked down the Purrers.
The last signal of the Purrers has been found\r\non the blue planet.
The Purrers have evaded Martian surveillance\r\nfor many years.
Originally walking with two feet,\r\nthe Purrers had to disguise themselves\r\nto resemble animals in their surroundings.
Eventually,\r\nthey became the Purrers today\r\nwho now walk with four feet.
The Martians tried to find the disguised Purrers.
As a result,\r\nmany cats were kidnapped by the UFOs.
The Purrers have also became\r\nincreasingly sensitive and timid.
There is a device that confuses the Martians' UFOs.
Purr Watch Tower:\r\nReflects the monitoring radio waves\r\nand confuses the UFO.
Purr Space Reflector:\r\nAll radio waves/energy can be reflected\r\nin any direction.
It is usually disguised as the Tang Plaza.\r\nWhen it's in danger of being exposed,\r\na discount event will be held.
When the UFO search failed...\r\nThe Martians came down directly\r\nand began kidnapping cats that they suspect.

I'm looking for 'Coco' the cat.
Age: 1 year old
Type: Tuxedo Cat
Feature: Tail with a white tip
Reward: 1,700,000 Mesos

I'm looking for 'Mongsil' the cat.
Age: 2 years old
Type: Tricolor Cat
Feature: Spot on one eye with a default angry face
It seems that no Purrers\r\nhave been found among the missing cats.
The blue planet has become increasingly polluted.\r\nThe science and technology passed down by the Purrers\r\nis turning the blue planet grey.
Purrers' food has also become increasingly contaminated.
As the Purrers ate these contaminated food,\r\ntheir health could be seen deteriorating.
Purr Medical Research Center:\r\nA healthcare and treatment center for the Purrers.
Pollution Detection Device:\r\nIdentify and warn the Purrers\r\nof any environmental pollution.
Purr Secret Entrance:\r\nWhen the emergency light is on,\r\nyou can sneak in without being exposed.
It was disguised as a general hospital,\r\nbut after the Purrers were caught entering and exiting,\r\nthey pretended to give treatment to animals.
Purr Secret Entrance:\r\nCan only be accessed by the Purrers\r\nusing a biometric system.
The existence of Purrers can be found\r\nin various ancient ruins and historical data.
People began to gather and track these evidences.
Men in Black:\r\nAlways appear at places with UFO sightings.
Men in Black:\r\nFirst to rush forward when a missing cat is reported.

Top Secret:
Isolation and memory manipulation of UFO witnesses.
To confirm that the missing cat is not a Purrer.
Martian is a foe and Purrer is a friend.
Martian:\r\nHateful and obsessed with the Purrers.\r\nIgnores human.

Purrer:
Friendly with humans and are able
to communicate with them.
Has the technology to fight against the Martians.

D-day of the Martian invasion:
Wasn't interested in the blue planet previously,
but as the environment began to deteriorate like that in Mars,
they started to prepare for the invasion.
The Alien Response Unit:\r\nPrepares for the Martian invasion,\r\nand conceal evidences to prevent social unrest.
Fighting against the Martians requires friendly\r\nco-operation with the Purrers.
The Alien Response Unit is usually disguised\r\nas a normal government office.

A long long time ago...
Since the day they fled to the blue planet,
the Purrers have been developing secret weapons
to use against the Martians.

No one knows...
But once in the past,
the secret weapons of the Purrers
had stopped a surprise UFO invasion by the Martians.
Greatest Space Show of All Time:\r\nLargest meteor shower observation on XX/XX/XXXX.
Conspiracy:\r\nRumor has it that a large amount of meteor shower\r\nwas caused by a battle between aliens.

The Purr Boat’s Hangar:
When a secret weapon is dispatched,
the Dome Stadium will open up and two launch pads
will emerge.
Cat Symbol:\r\nIt is disguised as an event balloon,\r\nand only the Purrers can recognize the hangar.
Launch Pad 1
Launch Pad 2
Underground Bunker:\r\nWhere the Purr Boat 1 and 2 are kept.

msg._value: A Ankho appeared! Free the Ankho to gain in its meow skill point.
A Ankho appeared! Free the Bori to gain in its meow skill point.
A Kid appeared! Free the Kid to gain in its meow skill point.
A Kotnip appeared! Free the Kotnip to gain in its meow skill point.
A Hani appeared! Free the Hani to gain in its meow skill point.

string._value: Santa Cruise travels across the entire universe to visit each planet.
Santa Cruise checks how well the planet's environment is maintained.
If the environment is well preserved, he sends down a variety of presents for the aboriginals of the planet.
(Santa Cruise is approaching)
(Mysterious star pieces are found in various places)
We've been finding these star pieces all over the place, meow!\r\nWhat on earth is this, meow?
Santa Surfer! What is this ticket with those star pieces and Santa drawn on it, meow?
(I'm hungry.. What should I eat when I get back? A burger? A slice of pizza? Hehe...)
Meow, meow~ Sounds delicious!
The Purrfect Rangers are guarding the endangered Land Turtle.
However, the Purrfect Rangers were unable to resist the temptation and escaped from the Land Turtle...
Falling into a trap, the Purrfect Rangers were captured.
The Land Turtle that must be protected is in the middle of the map.
Black Slimes from all sides of the map are approaching the Land Turtle.
Defeat Black Slimes and protect the Land Turtle!
The trapped Purrfect Rangers appear at the start of the stage.
Save the Purrfect Rangers using the arrow keys.
Use the points you've earned from saving the Purrfect Rangers to activate and upgrade the Purrfect Skills.
A long time ago, when Santa Cruise visited this planet...
A pilot fell in love with the deep blue ocean and jumped off Santa Cruise.
He parted with Santa Cruise,\r\nand since then, he's stayed in this planet to protect the ocean in solidarity.
Riding the surfing board and crashing into Black Slime will earn points.
Crashing into Big Wave will boost the surfing board's speed even more.
Black Slimes stick to wastes to contaminate the ocean,\r\nbut the water is restored to its pure form once Black Slimes are separated.
Points will be deducted when you crash into the protected creatures while surfing.\r\nEnjoy surfing while protecting the ocean creatures.
When the points accumulate and reach a certain level,\r\nboards and suits can be upgraded.
Upgrading to a higher class suit limits the ocean water's resistance,\r\nso the speed will increase.
Upgrading to a higher class suit makes the size bigger,\r\nso the crashing range will expand.
Upgrades can be done any time by finding Santa Surfer on the Singapore map.

text._value: You can earn the Cleanliness Point when you protect the Land Turtle. Talk to Dr. Mong.
You can earn the Ornament Point when you help Purrfect Rangers through Jolly to make their wishes.
You can earn each mission's Point when you complete 3 Santa's Visit Missions through Santa Surfer and Purrfect Rangers.
You can earn the Santa Surfer Point when you can go to the ocean and surf around to clean the ocean.

string._value: 隱藏在地下的喵喵號在平時偽裝成貓咪咖啡廳。
主要動力尚未恢復，無法出動。
在宇宙船能夠出動之前，需要將留有宇宙船外型的部分進行偽裝。
貓咪守衛隊的新隊員喬莉太喜歡聖誕節了。
過多的聖誕裝飾導致喵喵號上的機器發生故障。
其他隊員開始懷疑喬莉的隊員資格。
駕駛艙偽裝成貓玩具
雷達偽裝成貓玩具
淨水設備偽裝成貓飲水台
廁所偽裝成貓砂
醫療設施偽裝成貓咪氧氣室
激光炮臺偽裝成貓抓板
太陽能照明偽裝成貓用加熱器
控制中心偽裝成貓爬架
寢室偽裝成貓咪床
輔助動力機偽裝成貓咪跑步輪
孟博士用天體望遠鏡發現了一群冰隕石群。
領航員哈尼用雷達發現了一群冰隕石群。
如果被這種規模的冰隕石群直接撞擊，行星上的所有生命體都會有危險。
地下的喵喵號還不能出動，但是可以使用激光炮。
新隊員喬莉可以做到連老隊員都無法達成的遠距離射擊。
冰隕石群在撞擊行星之前被徹底摧毀了。
被破壞的冰隕石群灑落在行星上，變成了雪．．
喵喵號升級完成，終於可以飛上天空。
新隊員喬莉在本次事件的功勞得到了認可，正式成為隊員。
